title: Bellamy Challenges Luffy
description: Pages 3–7 focus on bellamy challenges luffy, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as bellamy forces Luffy into an emotional fight, while Law and Doflamingo prepare for the decisive clash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Zoro gets rid of their problems in one, fell swoop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, yeah... more times that I can count. Even you broke one of mine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If it had been clad in Haki, that same blade wouldn't have broken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Consider every Nick in your blade a blemish on your pride.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: and all swords shall be kokutou.*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Until you master this, I forbid you from touching alcohol.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Managed to keep that afloat, not a single person was hurt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: And besides, we'd already evacuated every- one around the town center!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Did you see that!? That huge stone statue was split in two!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Are you telling me that the top executive just got his ass beat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The plateau on which the Palace is located

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: All that power and he still didn't take part in the tournament... what a humble guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: And to think, he's still GARP's grandson's underling!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Well, King Riku was saved in the end, so I'll guess I'll let this one slide...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Blast it to bits! The factory that made us suffer for so long!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: We're never gonna be tricked and enslaved again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Hey hey, Pica just got his ass kicked!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: And the factory's just blown to bits, dofy! Behehehehehehe!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: But our defeated will rise again! And the factory shall be reborn!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: So do not lose hope! We've got manshelly on our side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: cap- tain! You are our captain, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: So you saved the princess, eh, Leo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What a valiant figure! You look exactly like the statue!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I think I might be just a couple steps short, but...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: You're Princess Mansherry, are you not? I've heard a lot about that power of yours.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: and I've also heard that it supposedly has a limit. Please, you've no need to use it on me.

summary: Bellamy Challenges Luffy advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
